gaming.description: Gaming content remains a dominant trend with varied formats such as gameplay, commentary, and custom map experiences.

GameofThrones.description: Strong brand presence with high viewer engagement on promotional content.

Markiplier.description: Consistently popular gaming creator known for engaging and entertaining content.

Emergency Awesome.description: Expert in breakdowns and analyses of popular media, attracting viewers interested in detailed content exploration.

SMii7Yplus.description: Focuses on humorous and engaging gaming content, often involving collaborations or custom maps.

VALORANT.description: Official channel content focusing on game updates and reveals, maintaining high interest among fans.

trailerAndPromotionalContent.actionableInsight: Capitalize on the high demand for exclusive trailers and previews by releasing content that includes breakdowns, predictions, and fan theories to engage viewers.

gamingContent.actionableInsight: Develop diverse gaming content formats such as live streams, custom map explorations, and humorous gameplay to capture a wide audience base.

crossCollaboration.actionableInsight: Encourage collaborations between creators to expand reach and attract cross-audience viewership, particularly in the gaming and entertainment sectors.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
